title: Planck Sky Map Step B — Three-Map Cross-Comparison

carrier_stability.verdict: Carrier invariant under temporal splitting (TV < 0.0001). 10,000× more stable than POSH.

polarization_bias.finding: P_frac systematically inflated in half-ring maps (47% bias at poles, 21% at plane)
polarization_bias.cause: Positive-definite noise bias in P = sqrt(Q²+U²)/I
polarization_bias.correction: P_debiased² = P_full² - σ_P² from half-ring difference

triad_structure: Partial — Pairs I and II present, Pair III requires multi-frequency data

bad_pixels.note: Half-ring maps have unobserved pixels at scan edges
